provenance.notes: Installed via /plugin install codex@openai-codex from the third-party openai-codex marketplace (/plugin marketplace add openai/codex-plugin-cc). Provenance only; no files copied. Ships /codex:* commands (review, adversarial-review, rescue, status, result, cancel, setup), the codex:codex-rescue subagent, and an optional Stop-hook review gate.
